summary: Iteration 5: Full regression on LindArt Premium SaaS. Validated Mixer page (OKLab/RGB mixing, 11 stops, copy hex, suggested pairs), Calculator Measure (3D) tab (6 shapes update volume correctly, waste % updates resin needed), Studio export (PDF 5140 bytes valid, PNG 64KB valid, CSS/Tailwind/JSON copy+download), Library PDF export, Navbar Mixer link (desktop+mobile), Home image regression (0 broken images), Compare page renders, and backend API regression (10/10 pytest pass including AI palette generation in pt-BR).

issues: Page <title> is still default 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of 'LindArt — Studio Premium' (minor branding polish)

action_items: (Optional polish) Update /app/frontend/public/index.html <title> to 'LindArt — Studio Premium de Resina' for SEO/branding consistency.
critical_code_review_comments: ExportModal: 'export-tab-png' and 'export-tab-pdf' double as immediate-download triggers (not tab switches). This is intentional but a bit confusing — consider renaming testids to 'export-action-png/pdf' for clarity. Functionally correct.

Mixer.jsx testids differ slightly from the names suggested in review_request (e.g. uses 'mixer-color-a-hex' instead of 'mixer-color-a-input', 'mixer-result-oklab-copy' instead of 'mixer-copy-oklab', 'mixer-suggestion-*' instead of 'mixer-suggested-pair-*'). Implementation is correct; consider aligning naming if external test suites reference the documented names.
Calculator.jsx SHAPES uses English ids (cylinder/sphere/hemisphere/box/cube/torus) while user-facing labels are pt-BR — consistent and fine.
All file sizes under 700-line guideline; no DRY violations spotted in changed files.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Library uses 1 default palette ('Rosê Suave') seeded from app data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoint for AI palette generation is POST /api/ai/generate-palette (NOT /api/palettes/generate as stated in review_request). Studio Export PDF/PNG fires download immediately on tab click (export-tab-pdf / export-tab-png) — use page.expect_download() listening on that click, not on export-download-btn. For Library export use [data-testid='lib-export-{id}']. Mixer color inputs are 'mixer-color-a-hex' / 'mixer-color-b-hex' (text+native picker), copy buttons are 'mixer-result-oklab-copy' / 'mixer-result-rgb-copy', suggestion buttons are 'mixer-suggestion-{i}'. Calculator measure shape ids use English: cylinder/sphere/hemisphere/box/cube/torus.
rca_of_the_issue: No bugs. All 6 features validated end-to-end. Initial false-positive on PDF export was caused by wrong assumption that the download is triggered by the generic export-download-btn — actually it's the export-tab-pdf button itself.
